wins: Operating income growth and margin expansion in a declining revenue environment
Reaffirming the midpoint of fiscal '24 adjusted EPS range while narrowing the range
Improved service levels and customer experience
Successful execution of DRIVE initiatives delivering $550 million in benefits
Advancements in digital and data-driven solutions for customer offerings
risks: International trade weakness and volume challenges
Postal volume headwind due to USPS contract issues
Service mix shift towards deferred and e-commerce products
